summary: Full frontend testing of PaperMind iteration 2: streaming chat, About page, eval number removal. All 18 test scenarios passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified: (1) Landing nav has Library/Chat/About/Get started — no eval numbers. Feature bento footers show pipeline flow text. (2) /about loads with 8-section TOC sidebar, 7 ingestion steps, 6-row RAGAS table, 4 decision cards, 4 tradeoff cards, CTA links to /library. (3) Chat streaming: thinking indicator → partial text with blinking cursor → full metadata (confidence badge, timing, agent trace). Input disabled with 'Generating…' during generation. (4) /chat/conv1?msg=m4 correctly shows 'Does GraphRAG address multi-hop questions...' — fix from iteration 1 confirmed. (5) Agent Trace tab on detail page has About link card, no RAGAS numbers, 7 pipeline stages. (6) Chat sidebar has Library and About links.
mocked_apis: All AI responses are MOCKED via setInterval streaming simulation (4 chars/22ms)
